content: Discovery pass agents (domain-scanner, invariant-extractor, exemplar-analyzer, asset-auditor) all completed on first iteration with no retries. The entire discovery pass finished in ~17 minutes. This suggests the discovery prompts are well-calibrated for domain-brief-to-model extraction and exemplar analysis tasks.
sourceEvidence: discovery-coordinator iteration=1, result=complete. All 4 child agents succeeded: scanner=scanned, extractor=extracted, auditor=audited, analyzer=analyzed.
